title: 174 Pcs Halloween Potion Bottles with Cork, Halloween Decorations Indoor Witchcraft Supplies Apothecary Bottles with Halloween Labels Pendants Candles Eye Screws Twines for Halloween Tiered Tray Decor
description:
About this item
Halloween Decor Set: The package includes 40 pcs mini potion bottles with cork (4 sizes: 10 pcs 20ml, 10 pcs 15ml, 10 pcs 12ml, 10 pcs 10ml), 40 pcs different pattern Halloween label stickers and 40 pcs various Halloween pendants. Besides, you will also get 40 pcs eye screws, 10 pcs colorful candles, 2 pcs brown twines, and 2 small plastic funnels. Note: The package does not contain potion ingredients in pictures, it is for decoration and reference only.)
Premium Material: These Halloween apothecary bottles are made of clear, non-toxic, thick glass. Eye screws and pendants are metal materials and stickers are waterproof paper. The colorful candles are non-toxic, odorless, also the twines and funnels are environmentally friendly materials. These accessories are indispensable in your Halloween decorations.
Safe Packaging And Good Satisfaction: Our potion bottles Halloween decor kit will come with a box and safety cotton, which can protect the kit from damage when shipping and you will get nice spell jar bottles and related Halloween accessories. Feel free to contact us if you have any questions about the products and we will offer the best service for you.
Wide Applications: 4 different sizes of potion bottles allow you to make multiple potions, like colored water, crystal particles, powder, animal hair, witch herbs, etc. All stickers and pendants are designed with Halloween elements, such as ghosts, bats, spiders, etc. You can use them for Halloween tiered trays decor, table settings, perfume saving, or other place decorations, which can enhance the Halloween atmosphere decoration indoor.
Ideal Halloween Decoration Craft Gift: You can use this Witchcraft bottle kit to make different styles of potion bottle jewelry that can be made into necklaces, bracelets, decorative ornaments, or other Halloween props for children and friends. This is totally the gift of choice for witch cosplayers and Harry Potter fans.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
This was cute because it came with various size bottles, and the bottles are glass! Once all assembled with the liquid inside they turned out super cute! Perfect for the Halloween party we had, worth the money!Came just as pictured & nothing was broken! Can't wait to put these together with my own little twist.Wife is having fun decorating for Halloween. Great fun product.Worked amazingly for extra decorations for a Harry Potter gender reveal!!!!These came with everything I needed and more. It had enough of the string that I could have done all of the bottles in one color if I had wanted to and it had a natural tan color also but I chose to not use it. This set had extra labels also but I liked these best. Definitely would buy again if I end up needing more bottles.Play Video
There are exactly 40 potion labels and they are all different, vials looked like good condition and there's 40 charms as well ^.^This is a review for "174 Pcs Halloween Potion Bottles with Cork, Halloween Decorations Indoor Witchcraft Supplies Apothecary Bottles with Halloween Labels Pendants Candles Eye Screws Twines for Halloween Tiered Tray Decor"

Set: Mini size

This is such a fun set. For whatever reason, I have jumped headfirst into making Halloween props this year. I have been collecting various sized and shaped glass bottles for several months, but this set is sooo much faster. yes, you don't get as much variety in the shape of the bottle, but the slowest part of my "potion making process" has been designing or searching for labels. Problem solved with this kit. It comes with labels and bottle charms.

The charms! This kit is worth the little bag of charms in and of itself. They are not cheap looking and hollow. They are nice little metal charms. Good variety in size and design.

The only thing in the kit I don't know how to use are the eye screws. I haven't figured out how those are meant to be used. I guess you could screw them into the cork, and make a necklace? The larger of the two bottles seems a little too large for that use. If you do make necklaces, BE SURE and glue to the corks into place. During shipping 3/4 of the corks came loose from the bottles. No big deal, as the bottles are well padded in form shaped Styrofoam. Just something to be aware of.

Overall, I am enjoying this set and I do recommend.This is so much fun! These are intended for Halloween decor but some of them I keep out as a joke. Like I have "Unfiltered Poison" on a shelf in the kitchen! Lol. I already had "Arsonic". You never know when you might need those! Haha! JK! They're definitely a conversation starter! This was a very large kit with stickers, bottles, charms, candles, twine, funnels.....everything you need is in the box! It was packed with care. They came in a stryrofoam square with a space for each bottle. Everything arrived in tact. This would be a great idea for a craft party with either adults or kids or both!I ordered these Halloween potion bottles for a party game and favors. For this price, I didn’t expect such great quality! The bottles are thick, sturdy glass - perfectly made - with cork stoppers. (Watch out, you really need to push in the stoppers securely for them to stay in!) The little metal charms that you can tie to each bottle are adorable, and also very well made with great detail - and so many different designs in different sizes. The labels are designed to look “antique “, so the lettering is not always sharp - but purposefully. They look cute, and again, so many different designs in different sizes. Has a flat (not shiny) lamination on the front, and is peel and stick (with strong adhesive). I think the only component that I wasn’t excited about is the candles, which didn’t travel well. They were put together in a bag, and some of them stuck together (and transferred color) and some got a little warped. Not sure what you are intended to do with them - they are too thin to fit into any of the bottle openings (slips right through to the bottom).
Overall, I am very happy with this great quality set - such a great value at this price.Tons of little vials to add to halloween decor, yes please! These were easy to sticker after sorting out the stickers by size. The added charms are nice and have a good weight to them but the twine it came with was kinda difficult to deal with as it kept stripping itself to 1 strand instead of the combined look. So I skipped that part. Otherwise they're quality prints an stick perfectly to the cork bottles.
reviews_1s: Sending it back..half the vials were broken. There were no labels and no charms in the box.This is the first review, the bottles came but nothing else and a fair amount of corks have fallen out. I'll update if the replacement comes and all the items are there. Update, I returned the second shipment. It was broken, corks missing, items missing.When I opened it, there were 5 broken glass bottles.
